title: The Red Grin: Psychological Horror
description: You are being watched. But don't look back.
body:
The Red Grin: Psychological Horror

You are being watched. But don't look back.

The Red Grin is not just a monster mod; it is a paranoia simulation designed to mess with your mind. The entity doesn't just attack—it waits, watches, and stalks you from the darkness.

💀 Key Features:

The 3rd Day Rule: The horror begins only after you've settled in. The first few days are safe... or so you think.

Intelligent Stalker: The Grin watches you from a distance. Sometimes hiding behind trees, sometimes breathing right down your neck.

Psychological Warfare:

Inventory Anomalies: You may find disturbing notes or "glitched" images appearing in your inventory slots when you least expect it.

The Void Fog: Randomly, your render distance may drop to zero, trapping you in a claustrophobic, dark void while cave sounds echo around you.

Paranoid Sounds: Was that a footstep behind you? Or just your mind playing tricks?

Mining Nightmares:

The Ghost Miner: In deep caves, you might hear the sound of a pickaxe approaching you. Be careful, it can break blocks near you.

Jumpscares: Be careful which block you break. He might be hiding inside the stone.

⚠️ WARNING: This mod contains loud noises, sudden jumpscares, and flashing images. Play at your own risk.

🛠️ Feedback & Bug Reports: This is the first release of The Red Grin. If you encounter any bugs, glitches, or feel like something is missing/could be improved, please let me know in the comments! Your feedback helps me make the mod even scarier.
